subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! This is Thy servant who hath forsaken his homeland until he entered Thy realm and become wholly detached [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی هاجر من دیاره حتی دخل فی دیارک و انقطع
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
